---
title: "atleast_4d"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:atleast_4d -->
```python
atleast_4d(*pparams) -> Union[Shaped[Array, ...], Sequence[Shaped[Array, ...]]]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:atleast_4d -->
*TODO: write an overview.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:atleast_4d -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `*pparams` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | `()` | — |

**Returns** `Union[Shaped[Array, ...], Sequence[Shaped[Array, ...]]]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
